Transparent Engineering Sizing

Interactive System Builder.

Most security quotes are inflated with unnecessary hardware and recurring subscription traps. Use our plain-English sizing engine below to calculate your exact equipment, video storage, and wiring requirements automatically—without sales pressure.

Zero Cloud Fee Traps

We size dedicated on-site video recorders with high-capacity surveillance drives. You own your footage completely, avoiding expensive monthly cloud storage bills.

100% Data Ownership

Right-Sized Hardware

Whether you manage a 10-unit residential block or a large commercial estate, our mathematical engine specifies the exact camera channels and network switches required.

British Standards Quality

Direct Engineer Handoff

When you finish estimating, your configuration attaches directly to your review request. You deal with executive engineering principals, never call-center salesmen.

1 Working Day Response

Video Clarity
Essential Add-Ons
What Your System Includes
Dedicated On-Site Video RecorderStores 30 days of crisp video safely inside your building (2x high-capacity drives). You own 100% of the footage—zero cloud subscriptions.
Professional Wiring & SetupOur engineers run neat, high-speed wiring, connect all 16 weather-proof cameras, and configure your mobile viewing app so it works instantly.
British Standard QualityEngineered to strict UK safety guidelines with documented handover packs and privacy protection for tenants and staff.
YOUR REQUIREMENT SUMMARY

DRIEVU PROJECT REQUIREMENT ESTIMATE: - Property Type: COMMERCIAL OFFICE - Security Cameras: 16x Weather-Proof Smart Cameras (4K Resolution with Human/Vehicle Detection) - Video Storage: Stores 30 days of clear video on-site (2x high-capacity drives, 48TB total) without monthly cloud fees - Network & Setup: 1x 16-Port High-Speed Network Switch, neat structured wiring, and professional mobile app configuration - Emergency Power: Includes battery backup unit so cameras keep recording during power cuts - Door Entry: Includes keyless intercom entry panels and smart access fobs - Design Standard: British Standards (BS EN guidelines) with strict UK GDPR privacy protection

Send To Requirement Form

Frequently Asked Scoping Questions.

Everything you need to know about our sizing calculations, hardware ownership, and engineering reviews.

Storing continuous, high-definition video in the cloud for multiple cameras requires massive internet upload speeds and costs hundreds of pounds in recurring monthly subscription fees. By providing a dedicated on-site video recorder with high-capacity surveillance drives, your footage stays crystal-clear, 100% private, and entirely under your ownership with zero monthly cloud fees.
No Call Centers · No Salesmen

Ready For An Engineering Assessment?

If you prefer to skip the calculator and speak directly with our team, submit your building details today. An engineering principal will review your property and respond within one working day.
